content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates consistent, specific, timely reads that change the conversation. In turn 6, the coach explicitly names the micro-expression ('Something flickered — I saw it') and the rhetorical pivot from depth to checklist — naming both the somatic signature and the deflection move in real time. In turn 8, the coach names the pattern of redirection ('You've now redirected us twice when we got close to your dad. With a laugh, a 'ten out of ten'...'), distinguishing the said from the shown and identifying the awareness-as-protection function — a clear defensiveness-as-identity-signal read. In turn 10, the coach catches the unfinished sentence ('You almost didn't stop just then') — a precise, timely read of the moment the client almost touched something and recoiled. In turn 12, the coach names the catch ('you caught it yourself this time') and reads the tenderness underneath. Reads consistently precede questions throughout. The coach is tracking the field, not just the content.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Notices the meta-shift ('asking why I keep ending up here rather than why they are like this') but this is content-level reframe, not a somatic/energetic read."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects back the specific language ('patient enough, present enough, good enough') and names the equation underneath — beginning to track stance, not just content."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit somatic read: 'Something flickered — I saw it' — and names the deflection pattern (pivot to checklist). Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pattern-level read: names the repeated redirection, the smoothness of it, and identifies awareness functioning as protection. Distinguishes said from shown."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Precise micro-read: catches the unfinished sentence and reflects it verbatim. Highly timely — exactly the moment that changes the conversation."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the client's own catch ('you caught it yourself'), then reads the tenderness and invites her to stay rather than convert to plan."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Holds the field steady; less a new read than sustaining the previous one."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "looking-for-whats-wrong"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["anxious-avoidant-dynamic"],
  "notes": "Coach did not explicitly ask the 'what would happen in your body if adored openly' question, though the client herself arrived at the edge of it in turn 15. On reads specifically, this is solidly a 3 — multiple specific, timely, somatic/linguistic reads that shifted the conversation."
}
